description: One-shot blind-v2 evaluation set (P1-11). It was first evaluated after the code and index were frozen. The first run exposed knowledge-base mapping and source-attribution defects, so this split is now retained as an unmodified, unblinded diagnostic set rather than a model-accuracy benchmark. Answer keys remain in data/evaluation-private/ (gitignored).
protocol: Preserve this split unchanged for diagnostic reproduction only. Do not tune against it or present its result as model accuracy. The answer key must NOT be committed. A new externally maintained blind split is required for the next generalization claim; see docs/BLIND_V2_EVALUATION_AUDIT.md.
